name: aurasemi
chineseName: 宁波奥拉半导体股份有限公司
tagline: High-Performance Analog and Mixed-Signal IC Solutions
description: Aurasemi is a leading Chinese semiconductor company specializing in high-performance analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits. Founded in 2018 and headquartered in Ningbo, China, the company focuses on clock chips, power management ICs, RF chips, and MEMS sensors for applications in 5G communications, data centers, automotive electronics, and IoT.
longDescription: Aurasemi (Ningbo Aurasemi Semiconductor Co., Ltd.) is a high-tech enterprise dedicated to the research and development of high-performance analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits. Established in 2018 with multiple R&D centers globally, Aurasemi has built a comprehensive product portfolio including clock analog chips, power management analog chips, RF analog chips, MEMS sensors, and water meter sensors. The company's products are widely used in information communications, data centers, IoT, automotive electronics, and industrial applications. With over 20 patents including 16 invention patents, Aurasemi is committed to becoming a leading high-performance analog chip design enterprise, providing customers with innovative, reliable, and cost-effective semiconductor solutions.

coreProducts.name: Clock Chips
coreProducts.description: High-precision clock generators, jitter attenuators, clock buffers, and PCIe clock drivers for networking, data centers, and communication systems

coreProducts.name: Power Management ICs
coreProducts.description: VRM controllers, voltage regulators, DC-DC converters, and LDOs for servers, networking equipment, and automotive applications

coreProducts.name: RF Chips
coreProducts.description: Power amplifiers, analog front-end modules, RF switches, and pre-amplifiers for wireless communication and 5G infrastructure

coreProducts.name: MEMS Sensors
coreProducts.description: Accelerometers, gyroscopes, position sensors, and IoT sensors for automotive, industrial, and consumer applications

industries.name: 5G Communications
industries.description: Clock and RF solutions for base stations, small cells, and 5G infrastructure equipment

industries.name: Data Centers
industries.description: Power management and clock solutions for servers, storage systems, and networking equipment

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: AEC-Q100 qualified chips for ADAS, infotainment, body electronics, and powertrain systems

industries.name: Industrial IoT
industries.description: Sensor and connectivity solutions for industrial automation, smart manufacturing, and IoT applications

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Power and timing solutions for smartphones, laptops, wearables, and smart home devices

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for automotive-grade integrated circuits

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality management system certification for semiconductor design and manufacturing

seoTitle: Aurasemi Distributor | Clock, Power, RF & Sensor ICs | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized Aurasemi distributor offering clock chips, power management ICs, RF chips, and MEMS sensors for 5G, data center, automotive, and IoT applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Aurasemi products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of Aurasemi (Ningbo Aurasemi Semiconductor). As an authorized partner, we provide genuine Aurasemi products with full technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain services. We have direct access to Aurasemi's engineering resources and can support your design-in requirements from concept to production.
faqs.decisionGuide: Purchase Aurasemi products from LiTong with confidence knowing you are getting genuine components with full warranty and technical support.

faqs.question: What are Aurasemi's core product categories?
faqs.answer: Aurasemi specializes in four main product categories: (1) Clock Chips - including high-precision clock generators, jitter attenuators, clock buffers, PCIe clock drivers, and real-time clocks; (2) Power Management ICs - featuring VRM controllers, DC-DC converters, linear regulators, and power modules; (3) RF Chips - comprising power amplifiers, analog front-end modules, RF switches, and pre-amplifiers; (4) MEMS Sensors - including accelerometers, gyroscopes, position sensors, and IoT sensors. These products serve applications in 5G communications, data centers, automotive electronics, and industrial IoT.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team to discuss which Aurasemi product category best fits your application requirements.

faqs.question: What makes Aurasemi different from other analog IC suppliers?
faqs.answer: Aurasemi differentiates itself through several key advantages: (1) Focus on high-performance analog and mixed-signal ICs with industry-leading specifications; (2) Strong R&D capability with multiple global R&D centers and over 20 patents; (3) Comprehensive product portfolio covering clock, power, RF, and sensor solutions; (4) Automotive-grade AEC-Q100 qualified products for demanding applications; (5) Competitive pricing while maintaining high quality and reliability; (6) Local technical support in China with global reach. Aurasemi's products are designed to meet the stringent requirements of 5G, data center, and automotive applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Aurasemi for cost-effective, high-performance analog IC solutions with strong local support.

faqs.question: Does Aurasemi offer automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Aurasemi offers AEC-Q100 qualified automotive-grade products across multiple categories. Their automotive portfolio includes clock generators and buffers for ADAS and infotainment systems, power management ICs for body electronics and powertrain applications, and MEMS sensors for vehicle dynamics and safety systems. These products undergo rigorous qualification testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, and EMC testing to meet automotive reliability standards. Aurasemi's automotive solutions are used by major Tier 1 suppliers and OEMs in China and globally.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for Aurasemi automotive product selection and PPAP documentation support.

faqs.question: What applications are Aurasemi products best suited for?
faqs.answer: Aurasemi products are optimized for high-performance applications including: (1) 5G Communications - clock and RF solutions for base stations and small cells; (2) Data Centers - power management and timing for servers and networking equipment; (3) Automotive Electronics - qualified chips for ADAS, infotainment, and body electronics; (4) Industrial IoT - sensors and connectivity for automation and smart manufacturing; (5) Consumer Electronics - power and timing for smartphones, laptops, and wearables. Aurasemi's focus on these high-growth markets ensures their products are designed to meet the latest technical requirements and industry standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: Share your application requirements with LiTong FAE team for personalized Aurasemi product recommendations.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Aurasemi products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Aurasemi products including: (1) Product selection guidance - helping you choose the right Aurasemi components for your application; (2) Application engineering - supporting schematic design, PCB layout, and system integration; (3) Reference designs - providing proven design examples and evaluation boards; (4) Failure analysis - investigating any quality issues or field failures; (5) Long-term supply - ensuring stable supply for production programs; (6) PPAP support - providing documentation for automotive qualification. Our FAE team has deep expertise in analog IC applications and can help optimize your designs using Aurasemi solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team for comprehensive technical support on Aurasemi products.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Aurasemi products?
faqs.answer: Aurasemi product lead times vary by product type and order volume: (1) Standard products - typically 4-6 weeks for common parts; (2) High-volume orders - may require 6-8 weeks depending on capacity; (3) New products - first samples may take 8-12 weeks for initial production; (4) Automotive qualified parts - typically 6-8 weeks with full traceability. LiTong maintains strategic inventory for high-demand Aurasemi products to support urgent requirements. For critical projects, we recommend forecasting and buffer stock arrangements. Contact LiTong sales for specific lead time information and scheduling.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard products 4-6 weeks, special products 6-8 weeks. Contact LiTong sales for specific lead times.
